rationale: S2.20 verdict is environmental ceiling, not structural mechanism elimination. T.2 GRACE adapter mechanism remains UNTESTED at the ceiling-relevant level. Standard t_branch v1.1 §5'-α path (T.2 GRACE elim → T.1 alt-model under MEMIT) would over-attribute. Modified routing per D-S220-S221-ROUTING-1: T.1-GRACE-3B retry isolates environmental from structural ceiling.

s221_routing.rationale: Smallest hardware-compatible candidate; preserves engine (GRACE_barebones), corpus (cfb-v3.yaml), probe set (probe-set-v3.yaml), hparams (init_epsilon=1.0, edit_lr=1.0, n_iter=200), and patches (P-1-GRACE + P-2-GRACE). 28-layer architecture with 3.2B params fits backward chain on RTX 4090 24 GiB.

expected_outcome.if_PASS: T.2 GRACE viable under environment relaxation; ceiling = environmental; WS3 implementation can target adapter mechanism for VRAM-fitting models
expected_outcome.if_FAIL_with_installation: T.2 GRACE narrow-discriminator pathology validated at adapter mechanism level; ceiling extends to model-class-agnostic adapter elim
expected_outcome.if_FAIL_at_environment: Ceiling propagates; investigate at A100 hardware OR halt T-branch

block_c_alternatives_rejected.Option (II) deeper-layer retry: departs from D-S219-Q3-1 layer corridor; inflates verdict envelope
block_c_alternatives_rejected.Option (III) bf16 precision retry: breaks D-S220-CHECKPOINT-7-1 anchor; falsifies cross-session bit-exact lineage
block_c_alternatives_rejected.Option (V) mid-session T.1 fold-in: session scope drift; runbook inheritance broken

successor_session_dependencies: S2.21 = T.1-GRACE-3B runbook v0.1 authoring + execution
S2.21 inheritance: t2_grace_runbook v0.1 (struct), grace-patches-canonical v0.1 → v0.2 (P-1/P-2-GRACE absorbed)
v0.2 codification analog session: parallel structure to S2.18 → v0.2 ROME codification
